name: In LA courts, same AEO rules as NY?
description: **Yes, motion for pro se**; trade secret limits.[3]

mainEntity.name: In LA courts, same AEO rules as NY?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Yes, motion for pro se**; trade secret limits.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Similar federal/state rules apply in CA; pro se access needs motion like elsewhere.**[3]

Overuse sanctionable, focused on trade secrets.[2]

- **Licensed attorney**: Order may specify.[3]
- **Modification**: Court discretion.[3]
- **Competitor shield**: Universal.[2]

Check local order; CA litigators handle via standard motions.
